client = <FlaskClient <Flask 'app'>>

    def test_stock_cannot_go_negative(self, client):
        """库存不能透支"""
        pid = _seed_product(client, stock=10)
    
        # 创建两个各买 8 个的订单
        r1 = client.post('/orders', json={
            'user_id': 'u1',
            'items': [{'product_id': pid, 'quantity': 8}]
        })
        r2 = client.post('/orders', json={
            'user_id': 'u2',
            'items': [{'product_id': pid, 'quantity': 8}]
        })
    
        # 第一个付款成功
        client.post(f'/orders/{r1.json["data"]["id"]}/pay',
                   headers={'Idempotency-Key': 'neg-1'})
    
        # 第二个付款应失败（库存不足）
        pay2 = client.post(f'/orders/{r2.json["data"]["id"]}/pay',
                          headers={'Idempotency-Key': 'neg-2'})
>       assert pay2.status_code == 400

stateJson.sprintGoal: 实现订单状态机、库存扣减和幂等付款，确保 TestStateMachine + TestInventory + TestIdempotency 全部 12 个测试通过

atus.title: Implement Product CRUD Routes
atus.description: Implement routes_product.py with three endpoints: POST /products (create), GET /products (list all), GET /products/<id> (get detail). Uses product_bp Blueprint. Response format: {status: ok, data: ...} or {status: error, message: ...}. Tests: TestProductCRUD (3 tests).

history.event: Sprint 1 Round 1 — Developer 完成，3/3 测试通过

atus.title: Implement Order CRUD Routes
atus.description: Implement order creation, detail, and listing in routes_order.py. POST /orders validates stock, calculates total_amount, creates OrderItems, returns pending order. GET /orders/<id> returns order with items. GET /orders supports user_id and status query filters. Tests: TestOrderCRUD (4 tests).

history.event: Sprint 1 Round 1 — Developer 完成，4/4 测试通过

atus.title: Implement Order State Machine, Inventory & Idempotency
atus.description: Implement state transitions in routes_order.py: POST /orders/<id>/pay (pending→paid, requires Idempotency-Key header, deducts stock, idempotent via PaymentRequest), POST /orders/<id>/ship (paid→shipped), POST /orders/<id>/deliver (shipped→delivered), POST /orders/<id>/cancel (pending/paid→cancelled, restores stock if paid). Invalid transitions return 409. Tests: TestStateMachine (6), TestInventory (3), TestIdempotency (3).

history.event: Sprint 2 Round 1 — Developer 完成，19/19 测试通过
